validation_id.description: Validation Identifier is simply an integer that is used to query this data table. An individual data entry is required for each validation event (e.g., validation of project activities by a VVB). The ID can be numbered from 1-n where n is the number of validation events.

current_crediting_period_start_date.description: Start date for the project's current crediting period, as validated by this validation event

current_crediting_period_end_date.description: End date for the project's current crediting period, as validated by this validation event

current_crediting_period_number.description: The number identifying the current crediting period, distinguishing the initial period from subsequent eligible renewals.

project_crediting_period_type.description: The designation of the crediting period as either fixed (=expiring after a single defined term), or renewable, allowing for extension through multiple eligible renewals

maximum_cumulative_crediting_duration.description: The maximum cumulative duration (in years) for which the project can generate units, encompassing the initial period and all eligible renewals granted to the project under the applicable methodology and Carbon Crediting Program.

maximum_number_of_crediting_periods.description: The maximum number of total crediting periods for which a project is eligible, encompassing the initial crediting period and the maximum number of renewals permitted under the applicable methodology and Carbon Crediting Program

current_crediting_period_duration.description: The specific duration (in years) of a single crediting period granted to the project under the applicable methodology and Carbon Crediting Program. For projects with a fixed project crediting period type, this field is equal to the maximum total crediting duration.
